{{Quote|Of course...beyond the scrap yard...But you'll never get there, broken one.|Sedriss|<ref name="Star Wars: Lethal Alliance">''[[Star Wars: Lethal Alliance]]''</ref>}}
'''Sedriss''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] slaver. The right-hand [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] of [[Zarien Kheev]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], Sedriss operated an Imperial slave prison. He met [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], who was searching for any signs of [[Rianna Saren]]. Sedriss told Fett that his service is most appreciated by [[Zarien Kheev|Kheev]] but didn't provide him with information about Saren. However, he soon encountered the Twi'lek and confronted her. Rianna defeated Sedriss and asked him about the prison. He gave her the location, but made the mistake of calling her "broken one" and was killed for that. Rianna then proceeded to take his [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Lethal Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
